demo_timestamps.description: Demonstrations and announcements of various connectors including Navisworks, Civil 3D Cloud, and Power BI connectors.
Discussion and example of how data exchange improves workflow for customer FCO.
Partner integrations with BIMDex and demonstration of InCitu AR application.
Creating a new model in model coordination and aggregating BIM models using APS viewer and ARC GIS.
Passion project demonstrating a connector for ARCA CAD data integration into Autodesk ecosystem.

client_mentions.name: FCO
client_mentions.context: FCO uses data exchange to move from AutoCAD to a model-based approach with Inventor and Revit.

client_mentions.name: VNV Bravo
client_mentions.context: Use of data exchange in operational visualization and communication workflows.

client_mentions.name: Deutsche Bahn
client_mentions.context: Adopting Revit and Navisworks connectors, and using data exchange for project simplification.

client_mentions.name: BIMDex
client_mentions.context: Partnering with Autodesk to use their connectors and data exchange for improved integration.

client_mentions.name: InCitu
client_mentions.context: Augmented reality startup using data exchange for mobile AR visualizations.

client_mentions.name: Graphisoft
client_mentions.context: Collaborating on a connector to integrate ARCA CAD data into Autodesk ecosystem.

summary: The video explores Autodesk's initiatives to improve data exchange by moving beyond traditional file-based interoperability to enable granular data sharing, emphasizing enhanced security and cloud collaboration. It highlights integrations such as BIM models with APS viewer and ARC GIS, a connector project with Graphisoft and ARCA CAD, and underscores the importance of interoperability while inviting feedback and participation in ongoing development.
